screens.description: Teams in a hierarchical structure using levels: level 0, the below level 1, then below level 2, etc. The only relationship between teams is the level

screens.title: Value Stream
screens.description: View: 4 columns view as a flow. User can add, update, delete items for each column: 1) diagnostic, 2) overall approach, 3) action plan and 4) proximate objectives.

screens.title: Add Radar Item
screens.description:
Allows user to add a radar item:
Attributes (one option only - mandatory):
Type: Threat or Oppotunity
Category: Business, Operating Model, Capabilities, People & Knowledge
Distance: Detected, Assessing, Assessed or Responding, Responded
Impact: Low, Medium or High
Tolerance: High, Medium or Low
Link (one only, not mandatory)
Zoom In: a link to another radar - if the user clicks, will open the link

Update and Delete will be supported

screens.title: Radar List
screens.description: List of radar items, filtering and sorting available
